texto: 'Hard Hit,' a YA collection of poems, explores the country of grief and survival. Mark, a 16-year-old boy and skilled pitcher, must confront the coming death of his beloved father with the help of his friends, family, baseball, and an idiosyncratic belief in God. I used my own experience of my parents' deaths to inform this journey.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Ann Turner sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. A afirmação “'Hard Hit,' a YA collection of poems, explores the country of grief and survival. Mark, a 16-year…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a familia, family, friends, útil em momentos de luto e viagem.
